descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Delta Flyers 12-4 to take 2-0 lead in BCJHL playoff semifinal series.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes dominated visiting Delta Flyers with a 12-4 victory on Wednesday to claim a 2-0 lead in their best-of-seven BCJHL semifinal series. Barry Kress and Marty Comeau each scored three goals for Richmond, with additional goals from Jason Talo, Rob Clarke, Kirk Phare, Dan Walton, Garth Lamb, and Tony Bobbitt. The teams accumulated 450 minutes in penalties, including 99 minutes after a major fight in the second period. Richmond outshot Delta 55-24.
